title: noccaea phrygia
intro: Noccaea phrygia, also known as Fräulein or Alpine Pennycress, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the mustard family (Brassicaceae). It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Noccaea phrygia include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support immune function, making it a popular herb in herbal remedies. Noccaea phrygia can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
